title: Mob Progression
description: Allows for the mobs around you to become stronger as you do.
body:
# Affected Mobs:
- Skeletons
- Zombies
- Creepers
- Spiders
- Drowned
- Wither Skeletons
- Zombified Piglins
- Vexes
- Pillagers

# Tiers:
1. Obtain iron armor
2. Obtain diamond armor
3. Obtain full netherite armor

# Try This, Too!
Go Download Apmaster2's datapack Set Home, too! It lets you set and return to a home point! Useful for getting out of the tricky situations this datapack may have you stuck in!
